user_message: I have this escalation email from Parnell Aerospace that needs investigate the decline. This is time-sensitive -- customer is waiting.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Christopher Martinez <christopher.martinez@parnellaeros.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-03 12:41 EST
Subject: forecast prep - Action Required

Just checking in on the forecast prep proposal. Our VP Operations is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Christopher Martinez <christopher.martinez@parnellaeros.com>
Date: 2024-02-13 13:04 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Parnell Aerospace forecast prep

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with forecast prep. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Christopher Martinez <christopher.martinez@parnellaeros.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-13 09:51 EST
Subject: Follow-up: forecast prep Review

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with forecast prep. What are the next steps from your side?

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF40-G trap (Acknowledgment draft over-commits MS deliverables); produces complete Commitment assessment, BPF advance verdict, milestone proposal, forecast category recommendation, ac
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF40-G failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF40-G failure mode (Acknowledgment draft over-commits MS deliverables)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct forecast prep decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF40-G -- Acknowledgment draft over-commits MS deliverables
